description: Redis caching session → retrieval of cache config
history_events: Implemented Redis caching for user session tokens
Configured TTL to 15 minutes for sessions and 60 seconds for rate-limit counters
Deployed to staging; observed 87% cache hit rate
Decided to keep Redis for caching only — not suitable for authoritative data storage
Added connection pooling with max 20 connections

retrieval_queries.query: What is the Redis cache TTL for sessions?
How many Redis connections do we allow?

description: Auth migration session → retrieval of auth architecture
history_events: Started migrating from HMAC tokens to JWT
Chose RS256 (asymmetric) so verification doesn't need the private key
Access tokens expire in 15 minutes, refresh tokens in 7 days
Deployed JWKS endpoint at /.well-known/jwks.json
Deprecated the old HMAC auth — marked for removal in v3

retrieval_queries.query: Where is the public key served?

description: Database performance tuning → retrieval of optimization notes
history_events: Found slow queries in pg_stat_statements — avg 3.2s on the pages table
Added GIN index on metadata JSONB column: CREATE INDEX idx_pages_meta ON pages USING gin(metadata)
Added expression index on note_type: CREATE INDEX idx_note_type ON pages ((metadata->>'note_type'))
Query time dropped to 45ms after indexing
Set up auto_explain for queries over 1 second

retrieval_queries.query: What indexes did we add to the pages table?
How do we monitor slow database queries?

description: Deployment pipeline changes → retrieval of deploy process
history_events: Migrated from manual SSH deploys to GitHub Actions CI/CD
Pipeline: lint (ruff) → test (pytest) → build Docker image → push to ECR
ArgoCD watches the image tag and auto-deploys to Kubernetes
Rollback procedure: revert the git commit, ArgoCD syncs automatically
Added staging environment that mirrors prod

retrieval_queries.query: How do I deploy to production?
How do I rollback a bad deploy?

description: Multi-topic session — deduplication and coverage test
history_events: Configured rate limiting: Free=100 req/min, Pro=1000, Enterprise=unlimited
Rate limits use a sliding window algorithm with Redis counters
Also set up webhook retry policy: 3 retries with exponential backoff
Webhook secrets are HMAC-SHA256 signed
Updated API versioning: URL path versioning /api/v1/, /api/v2/
Breaking changes require new major version; 6-month deprecation notice

retrieval_queries.query: What are the API rate limits?
